# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "accessPolicyObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "An array of Object IDs for applications/service principals to grant access to. These should be the Object IDs of the service principals."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "skuName": "standard",
    "vaultTenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
    "keyVaultAccessPolicies": "[if(empty(parameters('accessPolicyObjectIds')), json('[]'), map(parameters('accessPolicyObjectIds'), (id) => createObject('objectId', id, 'tenantId', variables('vaultTenantId'), 'permissions', createObject('keys', json('[]'), 'secrets', json('[\"get\", \"list\"]'), 'certificates', json('[]')))))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[variables('vaultTenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "[variables('skuName')]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[variables('keyVaultAccessPolicies')]",
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "bypass": "AzureServices"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
